title: 🏷️ BRAND
data_structure:
```json
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'BMW',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'full_name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Bayerische Motoren Werke',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'founded',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 1916,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'defunct',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'wmi',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'WBA',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'hsn',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '0005',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'country_code',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'DE',
        validation: ['isValidCountryCode'],
    },
]
```
